message:
fix(agentmail): add busy retry to RegisterAgent, not just CreateAgentIdentity

RegisterAgent is called by RegisterSessionAgent for session coordinator
registration. Without retry, the coordinator registration also fails
silently on transient busy errors, leaving agent.json unwritten.

Refs: #97

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
